query:
I'm currently in design for WA-4 at this time as well.  The briefing service is changing.. so in that design session, they were going to build a new one that looked like this: WA-4b: context_briefing as Index
  - Returns status = active entries only — deprecated suppressed
  - High-k default (k=20), index format per entry: {id, name, category, confidence, topic, snippet(150 chars)}
  - topic = entry.topic (already on EntryRecord, no join)
  - Ranking: existing fused score (WA-0 + WA-2 histogram boost) — no new phase weighting, W3-1 owns that
  - No injection_history filter — this is the comprehensive "entering phase" package
  - CompactPayload briefing path stays as-is (full content, not index)
  - SM protocol: call context_briefing(topic) immediately after each context_cycle(type: "phase")

entries.title: ADR-003 crt-027: IndexBriefingService Replaces BriefingService — Dependencies and k Default
ADR-002 col-025: synthesize_from_session Returns current_goal Directly
ADR-004 crt-027: CompactPayload Migrated to Flat Index Format
col-025 Wave 3: SubagentStart goal-present branch placement in ContextSearch arm
ADR-005: Briefing Graceful Degradation on Embed Not Ready
